---
title: "GPU Kernels"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Operator-level performance work across CUDA C++, Triton, and CuTe DSL.
</p>

<div class="project-stack">
  <!-- Add LayerNorm Kernel GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">LayerNorm Kernel</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Triton, CuTe DSL</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Vector Addition GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Vector Addition</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Triton, CUDA C++</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add GEMM GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">GEMM</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">CUDA C++, Triton, CuTe DSL</span>
  </a>
</div>
